footer.disclaimer: The owners and operators of this Website are not the primary producer (as that term is defined in 18 USC section 2257) of any of the visual content contained in the Website. The original records required pursuant to 18 U.S.C. section 2257 and 28 C.F.R. 75 for materials contained in the website are kept by the appropriate Custodian of Records as follows: MV CAPITAL, 50 avenue des Champs-Elysées, 75008 Paris, France
slavery.title: Anti Modern Slavery Declaration
slavery.content: Kinky stands against all forms of modern slavery and human trafficking, sex trafficking or abuse. Modern slavery is a crime and a violation of fundamental human rights. It takes various forms such as slavery, servitude, forced and compulsory labour and human trafficking, all of which have in common the deprivation of a person’s liberty by another in order to exploit them for personal or commercial gain. We are committed to acting with integrity and mitigating the risk of modern slavery and human trafficking in our business dealings and relationships with our creators and users. We are also committed to treating all employees, partners and vendors with respect and dignity, ensuring safe working conditions, and conducting environmentally responsible and ethical operations.
legal.title: Privacy Policy
legal.intro: At Kinky, protecting your privacy is our top priority. This Privacy Policy describes the policies and procedures on the collection, use, and disclosure of your information when you use our services. We comply with all relevant protection standards, including GDPR for Europe, CCPA for the United States, and LGPD for Brazil. Our commitment is to provide a premium and safe environment for our users.
legal.controller_content:
MV CAPITAL
50 avenue des champs Elysées
75008 Paris - France
Contact: support@kinky.live
legal.data_types_content:
We collect various types of Personal Data to provide and improve our service:
- Identifiers: Online identifier, Internet Protocol address, unique device identifiers.
- Usage Data: Information regarding how the site is accessed and used (e.g. browser type, version, time spent on pages, and navigation paths).
- Hardware Permissions: Your device's camera and microphone permissions are only requested and used when starting a live match.
- Account Data: Username, email address, and encrypted credentials.
legal.processing_content:
We work with trusted third-party providers to deliver our core services. Your data may be processed by the following entities:
- AWS & Google Cloud: Cloud computing and hosting infrastructure.
- MongoDB: Secure database management of user profiles and application state.
- Vonage: Real-time communication infrastructure for our high-quality video and audio chat services.
- Google Analytics 4: Monitors and analyzes web traffic. IP addresses are anonymized prior to any storage.
- Cloudflare: Provides performance optimization and advanced bot/DDoS protection.
- Crisp (Live Chat): Facilitates real-time customer support interactions.
- OneSignal: Manages site messaging and notification delivery.
legal.rights_eu_title: 4. Further Information for Users in the European Union (GDPR)
legal.rights_eu_content:
Under the GDPR, European Union users possess the following rights:
- Right to Access: Request copies of your processed data.
- Right to Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete information.
- Right to Erasure: Request the deletion of your data under certain conditions.
- Right to Object: Challenge processing based on legitimate interests or direct marketing.
- Right to Data Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
legal.rights_us_title: 5. Further Information for Users in the United States
legal.rights_us_content:
US residents (including CA, VA, CO, CT, TX, OR) are provided with specific rights at collection:
- Notice at Collection: We disclose the categories of information collected (Identifiers, Commercial Info, Geolocation, Internet Activity).
- Right to Access and Data Portability: You can request details of the data we hold.
- Right to Delete and Correct: You can request the removal or correction of your information.
- Right to Opt-Out: We do not 'sell' your info, but you have the right to opt-out of sharing for targeted advertising.
- Right to Limit Use of Sensitive Info: Restricting the processing of credentials to what is necessary.
legal.rights_br_title: 6. Further Information for Users in Brazil (LGPD)
legal.rights_br_content: Brazilian users possess the right to confirm the existence of data processing, access their data, and correct incomplete or inaccurate information.
legal.definitions_content:
- Personal Data: Any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
- Usage Data: Data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself.
- Data Subject: The natural person using our Service to whom the data belongs.
- Data Controller: MV CAPITAL, the entity that determines the purposes and means of the processing of Personal Data.
- Tracker: Any technology (e.g. Cookies, web beacons) that enables the tracking of users.
